tests.detail: 86 python tests, 7 web tests, gates clean before this change
4 tests: open/status, human-only refusal, human promote + CI demote, bad JSON rejection

tests.command: uv run ruff check src tests

visual_checks.description: not applicable: documentation and CLI wrapper only; no rendering surface

observations.statement: The existing optcg-material CLI already covers init, add, verify-auth, set-rights, strict and integrity-only checks, quality preflight, rectify with manual quadrilaterals, and register; no corrections were needed.
The promotion ledger had no CLI; optcg-promote (open-revision, promote, demote, status) now wraps the coded state machine and refuses human-only transitions for agent actors.

Quality gate thresholds are 1200x1600 minimum card resolution, Laplacian variance 70, bright clip 3 percent, dark clip 8 percent, group luminance drift 0.08; the capture checklist states these numbers.
No physical captures exist; card identity, private session path, and authentication await the human operator.

inferences.statement: The command sheet should let the operator run the full session without editing repository files, based on the CLI surface audit.

known_failures: research-renderer Playwright test can time out under parallel software-GPU load; it passes in isolation
unresolved_questions: Which Stage 1 card (standard rare holo vs basic SR) the operator will supply
Whether tilt sequences will be stills or sweep videos

recommended_state_transition.justification: Preparation only; no card evidence exists, so no profile advances beyond hypothesis.
